Subscript
.
~test~
.
<p><sub>test</sub></p>
.

Subscript should not work without content
.
~~
.
<p>~~</p>
.

Subscript should not allow nested markup
.
~foo ~bar~ baz~
.
<p>~foo <sub>bar</sub> baz~</p>
.

Subscript should handle escape sequences
.
~foo\_bar~
.
<p><sub>foo_bar</sub></p>
.

Subscript should not allow whitespace
.
~foo bar~
.
<p>~foo bar~</p>
.

Subscript allows escaped whitespace
.
~foo\ bar\ baz~
.
<p><sub>foo bar baz</sub></p>
.

Subscript: leading/trailing escaped whitespace
.
~\ foo\ ~
.
<p><sub> foo </sub></p>
.

Subscript: 7 backslashes + space (odd escapes space)
.
~\\\\\\\ ~
.
<p><sub>\\\ </sub></p>
.

Subscript: 6 backslashes + space (even leaves space unescaped)
.
~\\\\\\ ~
.
<p>~\\\ ~</p>
.

Subscript should not allow line breaks
.
~test
~
.
<p>~test
~</p>
.

Subscript should be able to be wrapped in emphasis
.
*~test~*
.
<p><em><sub>test</sub></em></p>
.

Subscript can contain escaped closing marker
.
~foo\~bar~
.
<p><sub>foo~bar</sub></p>
.
